name: Salarisoda
descrip: A yellow-and-black-patterned metallic can filled with a sloshing liquid that's popular among monsters immune to paralysis for its exotic, tingly flavor. Restores [ItemEnergy] Energy, applies 5 stacks of Paralysis, and increases Technique by 20 for 10 turns. {size=-15}Made with manticore tail venom.{/size}
useOutcome: |f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|SalarisodaBuff|n||f|ApplyStatusEffect|/|ParalysisHalf|n|[AttackerName] downs the can of sharp, sweet-sour-flavored fizzy liquid, and is filled with quickening energy... as well as with shivers from a sudden numbness that seizes [AttackerHisOrHer] muscles!
